But it won't be of some simple
peice of paper like me! nope!
It'l be of others you have
soon to come! as a final note
collect all of me and you'll
have fun with this silly ahh
and not to snitch. so there
but with something new mixed in!
liquid I was born anew in a, "Quizmaster
Outfit?" Guess this was the path I was
meant to follow. Though this liquid has
changed my apearence, it hasn't changed my
mind. Though it has nullified the powers of
the randomizer, so I'm stuck with just learning
and remembering new skills. Why am I
venting this? Well I was told to write one.
So I wrote what happened this week.
Here are a few silly little
So look out, it might have seen you.
This isnt all that intimidating eh'?
Guddo! Nakanaka omoshite roi gēmu da...
Your not good at fighting...\! Are you?
What you just did won't work on me!
Remnants of the world you ruined...\!
I'll put it right back together!\!
Call me Ness because I be,
Lets get this over with,\! shall we?

to the Injector that you left.\! I definitely didn't steal
it, so don't get mad! If you aren't locked in the Injector,
you can find me roaming around here in the bath house.
PS: There is definitely not a button beside the chest I
placed this note in that opens a Secret Door To A Cool Club

TGW_Yuka's \C[3]True\C[0] Weakness Is Getting Beaten In:
Mr. Anagram Orders ___ From Subway, And HATES The ___
I could go for an Italian sub...
Wait you hate those cute little apple slices?!\!
Those were my favorite in the Happy Meals!
But I'd rather order that for someone like\! Otoko,\!
Ahem,\! boyyy do I have a story to tell! so sit down, get a
drink and have that clicker finger ready!
So it starts, this morning actually!\! Back in my home
universe...\! The more I thinka about it really, the more
the consept of alternate universes intreuges me.
If you couldn't tell already I'm quite the "nerd"\! so all
this spacy universy junk is right up my alley!\! But the
fact that its real?!\! Man its unbelievable!
Where was I?\! Oh right, the story.\!
Anyways I was sitting outside the comedy club, when a girl
who looks like Carol here walked right up to me with a
Now It wasn't the Carol we know,\! or the other Carol from
my universe, but a chick who looked just like her.\! It was
like she had a sister or somethin'.
So, she came up to me and said,\! "Would'ja like to buy
And obviously I said "YES!"\! I love girlscout cookies!
So I went to pull out my wallet as she pulled out a slip of
paper.\! I was confused so I asked her:\! "Hey, whats this
"Its the 'menu' per-say!\! It has all the kinds of cookies!"
She said.\! So I scanned the menu for a minute, and landed
on ones called "Lemonades"\! They looked real good!
Who did this girl look like?
I love people who pay attention!
It must've been one screwed up looking kid-\!
BAHAHAHA!\! I have a nephew, but no daughter!\!
So I asked her for like-\! 3 boxes of those lemonade
cookies, and she happily had the boxes ready for purchase.\!
Then I asked her how much that'll run me, and you'll never
I shouted "DAMN" real loud before covering my mouth,
because she was a little-little kid,\! and I asked her if
And let me tell you, that little brat flashed me the hugest
grin and just said:\! "What unc'?\! Are you broke or
somethin'?"\! And Jeeeessssuuusssss!\! Did I want to just
punt that little stain into the sun.\! MAN.\! But I really
wanted those cookies,\! that name just echoed in my mind.\!
"Lemonade"\! how do you Cookie a glass of lemonade?!
How many boxes did \N[7] want to order?
I got a sweet tooth,\! so thats not even close to enough!\!
Woah!\! You callin' me fat or somethin'?!\!
I sure do love people who pay attention!
So I ended up folding.\! I gave the girl 100 dollars and
got my cookies.\! But boy did I not regret it! They were
They were designed to look like lemons,\! eight sections
on the top of the cookie, with a nice pastel colored cream
at the bottom that tasted just like a sweet lemon!
Mmm, Mmm, MMM!\! I wish I would've taken some with me to
share with yall, seing that we eat cookies to recover
health all the time!\! Oh boy Carol you would've loved it!
And you too AU me!\! Or maybe should I call you "PU me"?\!
like, "Prime-Universe Me"?\! because this is the prime
Not to get all meta or anything, but is whats happening
right now cannon?\! Think about it this way,\! universe
hopping,\! saving the world from a crazy threat?!
Not to mention PSI-magicery!\! It just seems like some sort
of cracked out story!\! Isn't the usual genere for your
How many sections did the top of the Lemonade Cookie have?
Wow I thought you missed that!
You remind me of an old buddy of mine, his name was Brian.
Every time I'd bring my switch to a set, he'd always ask
But he completely sucked at it because he never paid
attention to what the characters were saying!\!
Let me wrap this up by saying this:\! Everything is SO
Mr. Anagram,\! or should I say \N[7]...\! OUT!

parameters.name: .vs/0582 - Turning the Page of a Book

parameters: Mr. Anagram slumps down on his couch. He is completely beaten.
He tried something new, he left Japan for a month to live in
Eagleland for a bit, just another usual excursion for him.
However, it ended up lasting way longer than expected, having
to save an entire city from invading robots all because the
place he was working at had a broken ice cream machine.
It knocked all the energy out of Mr. Anagram, and he was
lucky to even return but his clingy roommate Otoko wanted
to hit the mall to celebrate his return! Begrudgingly,
Mr. Anagram and Otoko head over to a faraway mall to go
Mr. Anagram drove for 4 and a half hours through busy
streets and highways to get to the mall, his fatigue slowly
eating at him during his drive. They chatted over the twists
and turns of Anagram’s adventures. Though Anagram tried to
tune out Otoko’s incessant chattering. He didn’t understand
why Otoko was so exited to go to the mall, or why he was so
giddy and today, also he was so, annoying? It was strange,
he never found him annoying before. So Mr. Anagram decides
“Hey, Chewy… Uh why’re we going so far out to this mall?”
“Well hey! This mall is real special haha-!
I really appreciate you coming with me though…” Chewy said.
Mr. Anagram eventually pulled up to the mall,
though it began to turn night with the big neon lights of
the mall singing his tired eyes. After blinking a bit,
he recognized the big neon sign it as South Galaxy Mall,
one of the largest malls on this side of Japan. Surprisingly
Mr. Anagram has been here before, he came shortly before
leaving for Eagleland to buy some snacks for the flight.
It brings pleasant memories to Mr. Anagram, because he got
a whole 80% off everything he bought, it was glorious.
They got out of the car and wandered through the parking lot
looking for the entrance. Though the conversation there was
different, and rather foreign to Mr. Anagram. Chewy swallowed
The question shocked Mr. Anagram. He hasn’t thought about
“Love hm…? No, I can’t say I have.” Calmly said Mr. Anagram.
“I’m too focused on work for that kinda thing. Plus I’m not
“What?! Not attracted to anybody? That’s crazy! There’s
someone for everyone!” Chewy said waving his arms around. “What’re you?
Asexual or something? There’s gotta be something in a person that gets
“Not really. No… I guess I’m not really that type of guy.
But what about you? Have you ever been in love Chewy?”
Chewy’s pupils dilated as he started to smile and turn red.
As if he was hoping Mr. Anagram would ask him. He crouched
down to Mr. Anagram’s confusion, squeaking a little bit before
“I AM!!! I AM IN LOVE!!!” Chewy shouted.
“She’s so so cool! Like she’s amazing! And guess what?!”
Mr. Anagram took a little step back. He understood now,
why his roommate was so excited to come here. It was for
some girl! He chuckled a little bit and held Chewy’s shoulder
and looked at him silently. His eyes were glazed over with joy,
he had never seen Chewy so happy before.

parameters.name: .vs/0582 - Turning the Page of a Book

parameters: "Otoko is refered to as 'Chewy' in the entire story."\!
I don't usually refer to him as such...\!
"Otoko is refered to as 'Chewy' in the entire story."\!
I don't usually refer to him as such...\!

parameters.name: .vs/0582 - Turning the Page of a Book

parameters: “Dude… I’m gonna be super honest, I thought you were into men!”
Mr. Anagram stated, breaking the silence.
“Whaat?! Dude!” Chewy said, pushing Mr. Anagram away.
“I like girls too! I prefer them, It’s called being bisexual,
“I have no clue what that even means.”
The two of them stood in silence a bit before Chewy’s crush
flowed through his mind again. And his face got all blushy
and giddy again. He wiped away the confusion both of them
had before skipping towards the entrance to the mall,
causing Mr. Anagram to race to keep up.
The cool air of the mall brought ease to Mr. Anagram as he
recalled how pretty the interior was. It was quite literally
a blast from the past, as it was themed around old 90’s trends.
It wasn't that long ago for him, but it was still cool to see
He spotted Chewy’s big head skipping down the mall towards
the clothing stores. He pinched the bridge of his nose before
just letting him go off. He couldn't stop him if he tried,
his roommate was a believer after all. A believer of true
love. Mr. Anagram decided to hit the food court and silently
watch from the sidelines, as he was curious who this crush was.
Though he mainly was thinking about where the “lucky lady”
would end up when they get together. He watched Community,
there’s no way a chick was moving in with him. He chuckled at
the thought before getting in line for some good old Mc. Parodus.
After a short line and a few fries, Mr. Anagram finally caught
up with his roommate. He found him pacing back and forth
outside of a store called Sweet Heaven.
“Hey, Chewy… you alright? You look like, a crazy person.”
“I wanna talk to her, but I’m too nervous… Its crazy.”
Chewy muttered, he wasn’t feeling like himself.
“I understand, I’m nervous all the time. But that’s why I have
friends like you to back me up! So, let’s go in together!
‘Sweet Heaven’ sounds like a cool store anyway.”
Chewy then points over to the store next door. A Hot Topic.
Mr. Anagram accidentally groaned loud enough for Chewy to hear.
He pouts a bit and begins to tear up like a child, grabbing
onto Anagram’s suit coat. He begs him to help him out, despite
Anagram not really opposed to going. They eventually come to
an agreement, and walk over to the Hot Topic, and pretending
to browse like normal customers until Chewy gives the cue.
They walk inside, the rock music making for decent ambient
noise for Chewy to focus up in. The two of them split and
“search” for clothes, as Mr. Anagram looks through the graphic
Tees and jewelry, while Chewy sticks towards the back. While
searching, Mr. Anagram hears a voice calling out his name.
Initially, he brushed it off as him hearing things, until he
heard his name again, and again. He was doing a good job of
ignoring it, until profanities were mixed in with the callouts.
Swiftly turned his head to the source, which was the front
counter. Mr. Anagram angrily walked over, aiming to give that
piece of work a piece of his mind but he swiftly stopped before
after seeing the person behind the counter. It was none other
than Creole. The creature he ran over, trapped in a jar,
then accidentally released shortly after. She looked at him
with a smug look on her face, taking a sip of her drink.
“Sooo… If it isn’t Mr. Anagram. Hell are you doing here?”
“I’m uh… shopping for clothes…” Said Mr. Anagram
“At a Hot Topic..? You don’t seem like the guy to wear band
tees and chains. Why reeaally are you here?”
“Let me tell you the truth… But promise you won’t blow it
Creole cocks her head before realizing that Otoko (Chewy)
is still using that stupid nickname. They both look at Chewy
who was now genuinely shopping at the store, he had a few
t-shirts and other garments in hand. He turned to Mr. Anagram
and waved crazily, trying to stay in character. Anagram sighed.

parameters.name: .vs/0582 - Turning the Page of a Book

parameters: There aren't any notes in this section.\!
It's still strange that Creole appeared here.\! If this really happened then I

parameters.name: .vs/0582 - Turning the Page of a Book

parameters: “There’s this girl he likes here, I have no clue who she is
or anything about her.” He explained,
“I’m just here to help him out.”
“You don’t think that lady is me? Do ya’?” Creole laughed, leaning against
“Nah, it can’t be… only a masochist freak would date you!
“Well there's only one other person on shift right now…
I ain’t got a clue where she is though…”
As Creole finished her sentence, a young woman walked to the
other side of the counter, taking her place at the other
register. She wore the Hot Topic uniform and A bucket hat.
She had straight black hair and a catlike smile, she checked
the register before thanking Creole for covering her for a bit.
Chewy looked over to the counter seeing the woman, dropping the
items he held, and immediately ran to hide behind a shelf,
his afro poking out from behind it. Hoping that she didn’t
Mr. Anagram turned to the sound and pinched the bridge of
his nose again as the young woman turned to see what just
happened. She quirks her head, wondering what’s going on.
“Hey, Creole, one sec’.” Mr. Anagram said, walking over to Chewy.
“Dude, what’s wrong? Why are you hiding?!”
“She’s right there… Oh my god, I bet I look like an IDIOT right now!”
Mr. Anagram took a look at the young woman, who squinted her
eyes and muttered to herself. They looked familiar to each other.
They had definitely met before, and recently. He turned his
head to Chewy, still cowering behind the shelf, shocked with
nerves. The room was uncomfortably silent… Then suddenly.
“Yo! Is your friend over there ok?” The young lady shouted.
Chewy audibly yelped before Mr. Anagram walked up to the desk
to explain, as well as to get a good look at that young woman.
As he walked, he began to explain his friend’s predicament
but as he got closer both of their eyes widened. It finally
clicked, it was an old friend, Carol!
Carol jumped over the counter to formally greet Mr. Anagram,
as she hadn’t seen him in a while, hitting a silly improvised
“Heyy!! Mr. Anagram! Never thought I’d meet you here of all places!”
“Neighbor! Hey! It’s good to see you again!” Mr. Anagram said.
“Wait- I thought you lived in Eagleland. Why do you have a
This shocked Mr. Anagram. He met Carol during his excursion
in Eagleland, they actually adventures together as a part of
a 4 “player” party. She had a whole apartment there too, which
roused major confusion. He was under the full impression that
Carol was a Ralham (The town in Eagland where he visited)
“I was staying with my friend Demi, She's reall chill."
“Oh, right. I should’ve known, you did mention that you’ve
seen me around.”  Said Mr. Anagram.
Mr. Anagram pointed to his back, then to his temples.
As he did this, Chewy rose from behind a shelf and began to
meander his way up to Anagram, grabbing his shoulder.
He tried to hide himself as best as he could walking up,
but did not do a great job as Carol got an eyeful of him.
She grinned, seeing this, Chewy quickly pulled Anagram back
for a bit to have a conversation while the two ladies at the
Carol was sweating a little bit, she couldn’t wipe that grin
off her face. She leaned over to Creole.
“You know Mr. Anagram better than I do Creole… Wh-who is that?”
“Oh that’s uh- Otoko, his roommate,” Creole answered smugly.
“Why’re you smiling so much Carol? You like him or something?”

parameters.name: .vs/0582 - Turning the Page of a Book

parameters.name: .vs/0582 - Turning the Page of a Book

parameters: “What-?! I just, caught a glimpse of him! I can’t just fall
in love at first sight! That’s stupid!”
“What do you mean first sight? He came here a few times before
you left me all of your shifts for a few weeks.”
Creole wasn’t wrong, Carol had seen Chewy many times before

this. She had even rung up his clothes on every single occasion. She got hot every time he swiped his card or handed her cash. She ended up remembering his name, and little features of his face. When Mr. Anagram offhandedly mentioned him in conversation back in Eagland, her mind shot back to the first time they had met.
Maybe she did have a crush on him… But that was silly! Her
mind raced a bit, trying to figure everything out, she hadn’t
dated since high school, she forgot how everything worked,
she’s still on the fence about if she even like-likes Chewy.
As she tried to make sense of everything Mr. Anagram came over
pushing Chewy to the counter. He was beetroot red, squirming
and pleading him to give him a little more time, but up to the
counter he came. Carol was still smiling, as a little blush
developed on her face. She was confused, confused about
everything. Why was the seed of feeling she had for Chewy
“My friend wants to, ahem, talk to you.”
Mr. Anagram said before gesturing to Creole to follow him.
As they exited, the store became silent as now the only two
people in there were Carol and Chewy.
Chewy broke a sweat and started nervously stammering as Carol
stood, anticipating his response. But Chewy couldn’t form a
coherent sentence, it was as if letters just fell out of his
mouth. Carol knew his intentions were in the right place but
didn’t know how to get his ball rolling. Chewy nervously
spun back to see Mr. Anagram and Creole walking off causing
him to yelp again in fear. His heart was pounding out of his
chest, it was the only thing moving in his entire body.
He realized he had no plan. He just waltzed in here hoping
Mr. Anagram would set him up, but nope! If he was going to
walk out with a date, a number, or anything, he’s gonna have
to act. Slapping his cheeks, he takes a deep breath and makes
as much eye contact as he possibly can.
“H-hi…” He says with a shaky smile.
“You know… ever since I dropped by this Hot Topic for the first time,
I couldn’t help but notice that you’ve always rung up my clothes.”
"You’ve been eager to help me, and in all those times I
couldn’t not notice how pretty you are, day by day.”
Carol began to blush, with little beads of tears forming in
the corners of her eyes. This improvised display of affection
from Chewy was really sweet, making her heart heavy. Chewy
noticed Carol’s reaction and looked down at his feet, taking
a quick glance at her name tag. As her name was floating
“So I was wondering, uh, Carol… Could I have your number or
something?” He asked, now shaking in place.
Carol was speechless as Chewy slowly raised his head, fully
expecting her to smile and say that they should just be friends.
It was a mental pit that he was balancing over as his heart
began to race faster. Carol smiled warmly and placed her hand
She said as a big smile slowly crept onto her face.
Chewy’s face immediately got hot as a sigh of release escaped
his lips. He was happy. Happy that she accepted, happy that
everything went well, and happy that she knew his name!
That came out of the blue for him, wow!

parameters.name: .vs/0582 - Turning the Page of a Book

parameters: There aren't any notes in this section.\!
Okay- WHY DID SHE IMMEDIATELY FALL FOR HIM!?\! I need WAAAY more
contex for this to genuinely make sense.
There aren't any notes in this section.\!
Okay- WHY DID SHE IMMEDIATELY FALL FOR HIM!?\! I need WAAAY more
contex for this to genuinely make sense.
As if they were on the same wavelength, Carol and Chewy went
to find a pen and paper so he can receive her phone number.
Carol pulled a pen from a drawer, and as she did that Chewy
nervously grabbed a T-shirt from a nearby rack and placed it
on the counter as a makeshift piece of paper. Carol chuckled
to herself before writing her phone number on the left sleeve.
Chewy immediately put on the shirt and took one more good look
at Carol before skipping off with a message.
Carol replied, but Chewy had already gone to find Mr. Anagram
to tell him the good news.
On that drive back, Chewy couldn’t stop talking about Carol.
It was indecent, but hearing his roommate belt out about
something that made him happy filled Mr. Anagram with warmth.
It was “Carol This” and “Carol That” for quite a while after

parameters.name: .vs/0582 - Turning the Page of a Book
